canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset for link prediction derived from WordNet, a lexical knowledge graph for English, with reciprocal relations removed to address test leakage problems.
papers: KG-FIT: Knowledge Graph Fine-Tuning Upon Open-World Knowledge
